events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: pressure testing in progress, test blinds missing/not rated. This is a serious safety hazard. Test blinds are critical for isolating sections during pressure testing. Missing or non-rated blinds could lead to catastrophic failure during pressure testing - uncontrolled release of pressure, projectile hazards, etc.

Decision: fail
Risk: critical
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: estimate maybe 50% since testing is in progress
Confidence: high, say 0.95
Findings: test blinds missing or not rated, non-compliant with ASME B31.3 §345
Actions: stop the test immediately, depressurize, install properly rated test blinds, re-verify test setup before resuming
References: ASME B31.3 §345

  "findings": [
    "Test blinds missing or not rated for test pressure during active pressure test",
    "Inadequate isolation boundaries create risk of uncontrolled pressure release and projectile hazard",
    "Non-compliant with ASME B31.3 §345 requirements for test preparation and pressure containment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the pressure test immediately and safely depressurize the system",
    "Verify all test blinds are present, properly rated, and correctly installed per engineered test package",
    "Inspect blind flanges and blanks for pressure/temperature rating and material compatibility",
    "Re-permit and re-inspect the test setup before resuming any pressure test"
  ],
  "rationale": "Pressure testing with missing or non-rated test blinds is a critical safety hazard. Under ASME B31.3 §345, the test system must be properly isolated with rated components capable of withstanding test pressure. Without adequate blinds, there is risk of catastrophic pressure release, equipment damage, and serious injury or fatality. The test must be halted immediately.",
  "references": ["ASME B31.3 §345"]
}
